texto: Oh, the child you threatened once, the young shoot you stepped on, the Tamil you teased, is standing with a gun in front of you. His presence is taking you by surprise. How can you understand that it is the occupier who creates a poorali? You once dealt the blow. Now you are imprisoned. When a fox tries to eat the goat, the goat must turn into a tiger and leap. That is the edict of the times.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Malaravan que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “Oh, the child you threatened once, the young shoot you stepped on, the Tamil you teased, is stand…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, enemy, face-off, com foco em face-off e facing.
